title_or_content: Genome-scale perturb-seq experimental design and quality control — Study design of genome-scale CRISPRi perturb-seq in primary CD4+ T cells from 4 donors across Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr; cell counts per sample passing QC, knock-down efficiency, comparison vs arrayed RNA-seq and FACS screens, power analysis.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Mapping regulators of cytokines in primary CD4+ T cells — Heatmap of DE effects (LFC z-score) of 1556 regulators with significant trans-effects on 30 cytokines in Rest and Stim8hr; cytokine-regulator overview and arrayed validation (e.g. IL10/IL21).
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Functional gene programs of CD4+ T cells across conditions — Clustering of 3341 strong perturbations into regulator clusters; condition specificity, complex/pathway enrichment (e.g. Cluster 28 mitochondrial), downstream gene programs, T cell activation regulators.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Predicting regulators of CD4+ T cell polarization — pert2state linear model mapping observational Th2/Th1 bulk RNA-seq signatures onto perturbation effects; volcano of Th2/Th1 signature; nominated Th1/Th2 polarization regulators.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Predicting candidate regulators of CD4+ T cell aging from a population-scale cell atlas — OneK1K scRNA-seq aging signature (DE with age across CD4+ T subsets); volcano of aging signature; nominated regulators of aging via pert2state model.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Context-specific regulatory effects in perturb-seq explain genetic association signals on lymphocyte counts — Regulator-LoF burden correlation analysis (UKBB) nominating putative 'core' genes for lymphocyte-count traits; signed Q-Q plots.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo

title_or_content: Regulation of autoimmune-associated genes — Enrichment of GWAS-evidence genes (Open Targets) for autoimmune vs control diseases in regulators and downstream genes per cluster; context-specific autoimmune regulatory pathways.
notes: in-text figure (bioRxiv PDF); high-res source notebooks in GitHub repo
